_comment: Machine-readable pointer to THIS project's wiki layout, read by the skills and tools/validate.py. Other projects have their own conventions (CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md, docs/log.md, ...) — when operating inside another project, probe ITS conventions instead of assuming this layout; this file is the roster's instance, not a universal schema.

hub.name: second-brain
hub.write_policy: never-direct; flag hub-candidate in log; hub pulls via sync
